_LookupOutput.description: Placeholder output schema for lookup tool registration.
_LookupOutput.title: _LookupOutput

description:
LLM-visible subscribe input schema — `{tool_id, params, lifetime_seconds}`.

Mirrors :class:`kosmos.primitives.subscribe.SubscribeInput`. lifetime_seconds
enforces the FR-011 365-day ceiling.

lifetime_seconds.description: Bounded lifetime; ceiling 365 days (FR-011 of Spec 031).
lifetime_seconds.title: Lifetime Seconds

params.description: Modality-specific subscription parameters (region filter for CBS, polling_interval for REST-pull, rss_feed_url for RSS).
params.title: Params

tool_id.description: Registered subscribe adapter tool_id (CBS / REST-pull / RSS).
tool_id.title: Tool Id

title: subscribe
